name: Yone

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Way of the Hunter
passive.description_source: Innate - Intent:  Yone gains increased  critical strike chance.

effects.description: Innate - Intent: Yone's total critical strike chance is doubled from all other sources. Additionally,[ every 1% critical strike chance in excess of 100% is converted into 0.5 bonus attack damage. ][ every 50% critical strike chance in excess of 100% is converted into 25 bonus attack damage. ]
Yone's critical strikes deal only[ (180% + 27%) AD physical damage. ][ 90% of the critical damage champions usually have. ]

Innate - Steel and Spirit: Yone's basic attacks alternate between his Steel Sword and Azakana Sword on-attack. Yone begins attacking with Steel Sword, and basic attacks with Azakana Sword deal 50% AD physical damage and 50% AD magic damage.

passive.description: Innate - Intent: Yone's total critical strike chance is doubled from all other sources. Additionally,[ every 1% critical strike chance in excess of 100% is converted into 0.5 bonus attack damage. ][ every 50% critical strike chance in excess of 100% is converted into 25 bonus attack damage. ]
context_notes: Source notes (summary): There is no attack time-out between alternating swords.

basic_ability_1.name: Mortal Steel
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Yone thrusts his Steel Sword in a line in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit and applies  on-hit and  on-attack effects to the first enemy hit. This can  critically strike.

effects.description: Physical Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Yone thrusts his Steel Sword in a line in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, applies on-hit effects to the first enemy hit, and triggers on-attack effects once.

effects.description: If this hits at least one enemy, Yone generates a stack of Gathering Storm for 6 seconds, stacking up to 2 times and refreshing on subsequent hits. At 2 stacks, the next Mortal Steel cast consumes them all to become empowered with a new effect.

Gathering Storm Bonus: Yone dashes a fixed distance in the target direction and unleashes a whirlwind in the same direction, both applying and triggering the same effects and additionally knocking up enemies hit in their path for 0.75 seconds, but being unable to affect the same target twice.
Mortal Steel's thrust will fail to hit targets after the cast time if Yone was affected by disarming crowd control during it, but the cooldown of the ability is reset to 0.1 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Yone thrusts his Steel Sword in a line in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, applies on-hit effects to the first enemy hit, and triggers on-attack effects once. Mortal Steel's damage based on its AD ratio can critically strike for (200% + 30%) damage.
context_notes: Source castTime: 0.35 : 0.175 (based on bonus attack speed).
Source notes (summary): This ability always employs Quick cast.

basic_ability_2.name: Spirit Cleave
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Yone cleaves his Azakana Sword in a cone in the target direction, dealing equal parts physical and magic damage to enemies hit based on their maximum health.

effects.description: Total Mixed Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Yone cleaves with his Azakana Sword in a cone in the target direction, dealing equal parts physical and magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: Physical Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Yone cleaves with his Azakana Sword in a cone in the target direction, dealing equal parts physical and magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: Magic Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Yone cleaves with his Azakana Sword in a cone in the target direction, dealing equal parts physical and magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: If this hits an enemy, Yone grants himself a shield for 40 : 95.88 (based on level) (+ 65% bonus AD) for 1.5 seconds, increased by 100% if it hits a champion and by 50% for each subsequent champion hit.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Yone cleaves with his Azakana Sword in a cone in the target direction, dealing equal parts physical and magic damage to enemies hit. The total mixed damage has a minimum threshold of 40 : 490 (based on level) against minions and a maximum threshold of 150 : 340 (based on level) against monsters.
context_notes: Source castTime: 0.5 : 0.19 (based on bonus attack speed).
Source notes (summary): This ability always employs Quick cast.

basic_ability_3.name: Soul Unbound
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Yone  dashes in the target direction, leaving his body behind and entering Spirit Form for a few seconds.

effects.description: Active: Yone dashes a fixed distance in the target direction, including through terrain, discarding his body and entering Spirit Form for 5 seconds. Yone's body is untargetable and is sent the same distance behind the cast location, though not through terrain, and is reclaimed when Soul Unbound ends.
Damage Stored
effects.context_notes: Spirit Form: Yone becomes ghosted and gains 10% : 30% (based on seconds active) bonus movement speed.

effects.description: Activation resets Way of the Hunter's current sword state. Soul Unbound can be recast after 0.5 seconds, and automatically does so after the duration.

Recast: Yone dashes back to his body with displacement immunity, ending Spirit Form and consuming the marks on each champion to deal true damage equal to the total amount of damage stored against each of them.

The automatic recast is delayed if Yone is winding up a basic attack or is unable to recast Soul Unbound under any circumstances, which includes if he cannot move or cast abilities. Soul Unbound will also immediately recast upon death or entering resurrection.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Yone dashes a fixed distance in the target direction, including through terrain, discarding his body and entering Spirit Form for 5 seconds. Yone's body is untargetable and is sent the same distance behind the cast location, though not through terrain, and is reclaimed when Soul Unbound ends.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The marks store physical damage, magic damage, and true damage.

ultimate.name: Fate Sealed
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Yone prepares a strike over an area in the target direction,  knocking down and briefly  stunning enemies within. He then  blinks behind the furthest target, else to max range.

effects.description: Active: Yone prepares a strike over the cast time, then marks all enemies within an area in the target direction, knocking them down and stunning them for 1 second. He blinks 200 units beyond the center of the last enemy champion struck, or else to maximum range instead.
Total Mixed Damage
Physical Damage
Magic Damage
The stun ends prematurely upon the pull.

ultimate.description: Active: Yone prepares a strike over the cast time, then marks all enemies within an area in the target direction, knocking them down and stunning them for 1 second. He blinks 200 units beyond the center of the last enemy champion struck, or else to maximum range instead.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Yone will blink after a 0.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
